findings.evidence: `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule.lean:45` defines `Comodule` with `[AddCommMonoid C]`, and `mathlib/Mathlib/RingTheory/Coalgebra/Basic.lean:81` defines `Coalgebra` with `[AddCommMonoid A]`; the extra group structure on `C` is not part of those signatures.
findings.fix: Weaken the file-level assumption to `variable (C : Type v) [AddCommMonoid C] [Module R C] [Coalgebra R C]`; keep `[AddCommGroup]` only for bundled module carriers where `ModuleCat` requires it.
findings.issue: `ComoduleCat` requires `[AddCommGroup C]` for the coalgebra object even though the unbundled `Comodule` and Mathlib `Coalgebra` APIs only need `[AddCommMonoid C]`.

summary: The category mostly follows the bundled-module pattern, but the fixed coalgebra parameter is stronger than the underlying comodule API requires.
